stories.title: Autonomous micro-drone achieves first air-to-air insect kill on the way 'towards completely eradicating mosquitoes' — 40-gram unit uses car parking sensors, can eliminate insects at up to 26 feet

sources.title: Autonomous micro-drone achieves first air-to-air insect kill on the way 'towards completely eradicating mosquitoes' — 40-gram unit uses car parking sensors, can eliminate insects at up to 26 feet

sources.summary: A micro-drone designed to locate and eradicate mosquitoes has passed an important milestone with its first recorded air-to-air kill.

stories.title: 台积电确认 A14 更新中良率和性能显着提升——AI/HPC 和智能手机客户的浓厚兴趣 / TSMC confirms significant yield and performance improvements in A14 update — strong interest from AI/HPC and smartphone customers

sources.title: 台积电确认 A14 更新中良率和性能显着提升——AI/HPC 和智能手机客户的浓厚兴趣 / TSMC confirms significant yield and performance improvements in A14 update — strong interest from AI/HPC and smartphone customers

sources.title_en: TSMC confirms significant yield and performance improvements in A14 update — strong interest from AI/HPC and smartphone customers
sources.title_original: TSMC confirms significant yield and performance improvements in A14 update — strong interest from AI/HPC and smartphone customers
sources.summary: TSMC's A14 process technology progresses faster than N2 at this stage of development as developers of both client and AI/HPC plan to use it.
sources.summary_zh: 台积电的 A14 工艺技术在现阶段的发展速度比 N2 更快，因为客户端和 AI/HPC 的开发人员都计划使用它。

stories.title: Nvidia RTX 50 Super GPUs are reportedly ready, but stuck in limbo due to excessive GDDR7 pricing — 3GB GDDR7 module costs triple the price of 2GB

sources.title: Nvidia RTX 50 Super GPUs are reportedly ready, but stuck in limbo due to excessive GDDR7 pricing — 3GB GDDR7 module costs triple the price of 2GB
sources.title_en: Nvidia RTX 50 Super GPUs are reportedly ready, but stuck in limbo due to excessive GDDR7 pricing — 3GB GDDR7 module costs triple the price of 2GB
sources.title_original: Nvidia RTX 50 Super GPUs are reportedly ready, but stuck in limbo due to excessive GDDR7 pricing — 3GB GDDR7 module costs triple the price of 2GB
sources.summary: The 3GB GDDR7 chips that the RTX 50 Super GPUs will use reportedly cost twice to thrice as much as the 2GB chips found on vanilla RTX 50-series graphics cards. This would likely push the retail price of these GPUs way beyond Nvidia's target MSRP.
sources.summary_zh: 据报道，RTX 50 Super GPU 将使用的 3GB GDDR7 芯片的成本是普通 RTX 50 系列显卡上的 2GB 芯片的两倍到三倍。这可能会使这些 GPU 的零售价格远远超出 Nvidia 的目标建议零售价。

stories.title: ASML's planned Low-NA EUV machine price hikes reportedly frustrate TSMC — lithography machine maker comes knocking to make bank on TSMC's profitable fabs, potentially costing the Taiwanese chipmaker billions

sources.title: ASML's planned Low-NA EUV machine price hikes reportedly frustrate TSMC — lithography machine maker comes knocking to make bank on TSMC's profitable fabs, potentially costing the Taiwanese chipmaker billions
sources.title_en: ASML's planned Low-NA EUV machine price hikes reportedly frustrate TSMC — lithography machine maker comes knocking to make bank on TSMC's profitable fabs, potentially costing the Taiwanese chipmaker billions
sources.title_original: ASML's planned Low-NA EUV machine price hikes reportedly frustrate TSMC — lithography machine maker comes knocking to make bank on TSMC's profitable fabs, potentially costing the Taiwanese chipmaker billions
sources.summary: ASML says that the increased productivity of its Low-NA EUV tools gives it an option to increase the prices of these scanners in the future. The move may have a drastic effect on TSMC's future expansion plans, as the foundry made a big bet on existing lithography systems.
sources.summary_zh: ASML 表示，其低数值孔径 EUV 工具生产率的提高使其可以选择在未来提高这些扫描仪的价格。此举可能会对台积电未来的扩张计划产生巨大影响，因为这家代工厂在现有的光刻系统上下了很大的赌注。
